title: bonnaya succosa
intro: Bonnaya succosa, also known as the dwarf convolvulus or the lesser jasmine, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Convolvulaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Bonnaya succosa include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in managing fever, cough, and cold. The herbal preparations of Bonnaya succosa include the dried leaves and roots, which can be made into teas, decoctions, or powders for medicinal use.
